---
title: "wubi or wupi  ????"
date: 2008-11-14
forum: General Help
---

### Post by hoboy on 2008-11-14
what is the difference between wubi and wupi ?

---

### Post by starcannon on 2008-11-14
Wupi appears to be a radio station, or a typo for wubi, my bit of googling around with wupi+linux always lead back to the wubi home page.

Wubi is excellent, it lets you have a dual boot system while not requiring you to partition your hard drive, and if you decide you like Ubuntu can even allow you to set up an ubuntu partition for continued dual boot, or if you decide Ubuntu is not for you then removal is as simple as running the Windows software removal utility, and your back to a regular windows install.

GL and keep it fun, and always back up important data BEFORE messing with your operating system.

---
